tradeLessons.lesson: AVAXUSDT: SL hit same minute as SOLUSDT. Two highly correlated altcoins entered simultaneously in same direction = double exposure to the same market move. Both lost together.
tradeLessons.adaptation: RULE: Do not hold more than 1 open trade in highly correlated altcoins (SOL/AVAX/ATOM/LINK are all correlated in bull moves). Stagger entries or pick only the strongest signal.

tradeLessons.lesson: LINKUSDT: Breakeven scalp — trailing stop moved to entry and triggered. Capital protected.
tradeLessons.adaptation: Trailing stop to breakeven is working correctly. This is the correct outcome for a setup that moved in our favor briefly then reversed.

tradeLessons.lesson: XAUTUSDT: Breakeven hit — trailing stop protected capital. Gold (XAUT) behaves differently from crypto — it does not follow the same RSI/VWAP mean-reversion cycles. During crypto bull runs, gold tends to consolidate or also rally separately.
tradeLessons.adaptation: CONSIDER: Remove XAUTUSDT from watchlist or reduce position size. Gold's correlation to crypto is unreliable for this strategy — RSI overbought in XAUT means different things than in crypto.

tradeLessons.lesson: LINKUSDT: Early exit +0.43% — setup invalidated (RSI=100, price above VWAP+EMA20). Tiny gain after fees likely = near-zero or slight negative real PnL.
tradeLessons.adaptation: Early exits below +1% should be treated as breakeven. The early-exit logic is correct in principle but entries need to be better to have room for full TP.

tradeLessons.lesson: DOGEUSDT: SL hit. Trade also had the SL/TP precision bug (toFixed(2) rounding $0.10 prices to entry price). Bug now fixed with dynamic decimal places. Underlying setup also weak — extreme_resistance regime during broad bull move.
tradeLessons.adaptation: Price precision bug fixed. Also: extreme_resistance regime entries during a market-wide bull run are high risk — the 'resistance' breaks easily in euphoria conditions.

notes: === PATTERN ANALYSIS (updated 2026-05-02) ===
LOSS PATTERN #1 — Weak lower-TF confirmation (2 trades, -$2.98)
Both ATOM losses: only 1/4 lower-TF checks passed. The 4H signal was there but
the 15m context was NOT confirming. Entering on 1/4 is gambling, not edge.
→ FIX NEEDED: Raise minimum passCount to 2 before entering any standard trade.
LOSS PATTERN #2 — Revenge trading same symbol (1 extra trade, -$1.49)
ATOM was re-entered 3 hours after the first loss with identical conditions.
The 4H candle hadn't even closed — same stale signal re-triggered.
→ FIX NEEDED: Symbol cooldown of 4+ hours after any LOSS on that symbol.
LOSS PATTERN #3 — Correlated altcoin double exposure (2 trades, -$2.99)
SOL + AVAX both shorted at 13:17 on Apr 29. Both are high-beta alts that move
together in bull market. Losing both = same as 2x size on one trade.
→ FIX NEEDED: Max 1 open trade per 'altcoin group' (SOL/AVAX/ATOM/LINK/DOGE).
LOSS PATTERN #4 — Trading against capitulation event (3 trades, -$8.99)
On Apr 28, 13 out of 14 coins were RSI>90. This is peak euphoria — not mean-
reversion territory. Shorting during this = shorting a rocket at launch.
→ FIX NEEDED: After capitulation (10+ coins overbought), no new shorts for 6h.
WIN PATTERN — What the winning trades had in common:
BTC WIN: 3/4 LTF, RSI(14)=55, 1.67% from VWAP, exhaustion volume → Clean short
BNB SCALP: RSI=87.8 + volume 30.5x + reversal candle → 3 signals aligned
ATOM EARLY EXIT: Setup invalidated early but still in profit → exit logic worked
LINK EARLY EXIT: Same — small but correct early exit
→ REINFORCE: Multi-signal alignment (3+ checks) = higher win rate.
RSI(14) < 65 at entry = not in a strong trend = mean reversion has room.
FEE IMPACT REALITY CHECK:
At 5x leverage: fee drag = 0.6% per trade (both sides). Need >0.6% net move to profit.
At 10x leverage: fee drag = 1.2% per trade. Need >1.2% net move to profit.
Current average loss: ~3.5% | Average win: ~8% (excl. BTC outlier)
Win rate needed to break even at current R:R = 30% (we're at 33% — barely above)
To be comfortably profitable, need either: win rate > 45% OR average win > 2× average loss
OVERALL VERDICT:
The strategy CAN work (BTC +30% trade proves it) but needs tighter entry filters.
Current bot is over-trading — taking 12 trades in ~4 days with weak confirmation.
Quality over quantity: 4-5 high-conviction trades per week > 12 marginal ones.
Recommended Railway STOP_LOSS_PCT=1.5, leverage 5x for standard, 10x for scalps only.

changes: Win rate 25% — tightened RSI threshold to 38
Win rate 20% — tightened RSI threshold to 36
Win rate 20% — tightened RSI threshold to 35
